ocean.name: Big Five Personality (IPIP-NEO-120)
ocean.instructions:
Reply with a number from **1 to 5**:
1: Strongly Disagree
2: Disagree
3: Neutral
4: Agree
5: Strongly Agree

enneagram.name: Enneagram Type Indicator (81-Item)
enneagram.instructions:
Reply with a number from **1 to 5**:
1: Not at all accurate
2: Slightly accurate
3: Moderately accurate
4: Very accurate
5: Extremely accurate

questions.q: I hold myself to very high standards in everything I do.
I notice errors and imperfections that others overlook.
I feel a strong sense of right and wrong.
I often feel frustrated when things aren't done properly.
I believe there is always a correct way to do things.
I am very disciplined and self-controlled.
I feel guilty when I don't live up to my own standards.
I spend a lot of time trying to improve myself.
I get upset when people break rules or act irresponsibly.
I go out of my way to help others, even at my own expense.
I can sense what other people need before they ask.
I feel most valued when I am needed by others.
I find it hard to say no when someone asks for help.
I often put other people's needs before my own.
I feel hurt when my efforts to help are not appreciated.
I pride myself on being generous and caring.
I become resentful when I feel taken for granted.
I tend to give advice even when it isn't asked for.
I am highly motivated to succeed and achieve goals.
I adapt my image depending on the social situation.
Being seen as successful is very important to me.
I work harder than most people I know.
I feel worthless when I am not productive.
I tend to compare myself to others' achievements.
I focus on efficiency and getting results.
I set ambitious goals and push myself to reach them.
I fear being perceived as a failure.
I feel fundamentally different from other people.
I have deep, intense emotions that others don't seem to understand.
I am drawn to what is authentic and meaningful.
I often feel nostalgic or longing for something missing in my life.
I express myself through creative or artistic outlets.
I tend to dwell on my feelings, especially painful ones.
I feel envious when others have what I feel I lack.
I have a rich inner emotional life.
I feel misunderstood by most people.
I need a lot of private time to think and recharge.
I prefer to observe situations before getting involved.
I feel drained by too much social interaction.
I am intensely curious and love to learn new things.
I tend to detach from my emotions to think clearly.
I dislike being dependent on others for anything.
I accumulate knowledge and expertise in areas that interest me.
I feel overwhelmed when too many demands are placed on me.
I guard my time and energy carefully.
I tend to imagine worst-case scenarios.
I value security and stability above most things.
I am very loyal to the people and groups I trust.
I often question whether I can trust people's intentions.
I look for hidden dangers and potential problems.
I feel anxious when things are uncertain.
I seek guidance and reassurance from trusted authorities.
I prepare thoroughly for things that could go wrong.
I oscillate between trusting and doubting others.
I love having many exciting options and possibilities.
I avoid pain and negative experiences whenever I can.
I get bored easily and need constant stimulation.
I am optimistic and focus on the positive side of things.
I have a hard time committing to just one thing.

I am protective of people who are vulnerable.

I take charge in situations where no one else will.
I value strength and have little patience for weakness.

I push back when someone tries to impose their will on me.
I can be intimidating even when I don't mean to be.
I avoid conflict and try to keep the peace.
I go along with others to maintain harmony.
I have trouble knowing what I really want.
I tend to merge with other people's agendas.
I procrastinate on things that feel overwhelming.

I am easygoing and rarely get upset.

I struggle to assert my own needs and opinions.
